Mtn To Strike
Off Calendar Nov-29-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Roberto Ripamonti, Esq., Law Offices, 415-729-4718, for defendants and moving party

No other Appearance. Tentative Ruling is adopted. DEFENDANT TURNER- SHIBATA INC. AND LENA TURNER'S Motion to Strike is Granted with ten days leave to amend. Plaintiff failed to provide courtesy copies of the opposition papers in compliance with San Francisco Local Rule 2.6B. Order signed in open court.
As to Defendants' Demurrer, it was noticed for hearing on 11/28/11, moving party may appear ex-parte for a motion for reconsideration. Judge: Harold E. Kahn, Court Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR 7077

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-28-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANTS TURNER- SHIBATA INC. AND LENA TURNER'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT.
